name: Hôpital National des Quinze-Vingts - Service TMS
description_long: The Hôpital National des Quinze-Vingts offers transcranial magnetic stimulation (TMS) services through its neuro-imaging department. As a leading Parisian ophthalmic and neurological hospital, it provides TMS for both clinical treatment and research applications, treating conditions including neuropathic pain, treatment-resistant depression, and various neurological disorders. The hospital is part of the AP-HP network, France's largest public hospital system.

doctors_data.name: Service de Neuro-imagerie
doctors_data.title: Neuro-imaging Department
doctors_data.bio: The neuro-imaging department at Hôpital des Quinze-Vingts provides transcranial magnetic stimulation services for clinical and research purposes.

name: Hôpital Pitié-Salpêtrière - Service de Psychiatrie Adulte
description_long: The Adult Psychiatry Department at Hôpital Pitié-Salpêtrière, one of the largest hospitals in Europe, offers rTMS as part of its innovative therapeutic platform. The STOCAD unit includes 7 beds dedicated to brain stimulation techniques including non-invasive transcranial magnetic stimulation and deep brain stimulation evaluation. The service is actively involved in a major multicentre clinical research program (TRD*TMS) studying the efficacy and cost-effectiveness of rTMS for treatment-resistant depression across 20 centers in France.

doctors_data.name: Unité STOCAD
doctors_data.title: Brain Stimulation Unit
doctors_data.bio: The STOCAD unit within the Adult Psychiatry Department has 15 inpatient beds with 7 dedicated to brain stimulation techniques including non-invasive TMS. The unit leads the TRD*TMS multicentre research study across 20 French centers.

name: Centre Hospitalier Théophile Roussel - Service rTMS
description_long: The Centre Hospitalier Théophile Roussel in Montesson opened its rTMS service in 2018 as part of its innovative psychiatric care practices. The center uses repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation to treat patients with treatment-resistant depression and resistant hallucinations. Treatment protocols typically involve 15-20 sessions at a rate of one session per day, 5 days per week, with each session lasting 15-30 minutes.

name: CEMNIS - Centre de neuro-Modulation Non-Invasive de Strasbourg
description_long: CEMNIS is a dedicated care unit at the Hôpital Civil de Strasbourg for treating refractory neuro-psychiatric conditions using non-invasive neuromodulation techniques. Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) is the center's primary tool, validated for treating neuropathic pain (5-10 sessions), treatment-resistant depression (20-30 sessions), and hallucinations and apathy in chronic psychosis (10 sessions). The center operates Monday to Friday, 9h to 17h30.

name: Clinique du Parc Lyon - Service rTMS
description_long: Clinique du Parc in Lyon, part of the Ramsay Santé network, offers repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (rTMS) for treating depression resistant to conventional therapies. The rTMS treatment uses a coil placed on the patient's head generating a magnetic field to stimulate or inhibit targeted brain areas. Treatment involves an average of 15-20 sessions, one session per day, 5 days per week. Each session lasts 15-30 minutes depending on the protocol. Patients remain awake during sessions and can resume activities immediately after.

name: Psychiatrie Pullman Prado - rTMS Marseille
description_long: Located at 255 Avenue du Prado in Marseille, the Psychiatrie Pullman Prado clinic specializes in rTMS treatment for treatment-resistant depression and other psychiatric conditions. The clinic has a team of psychiatrists trained in transcranial magnetic stimulation and electroconvulsive therapy, offering comprehensive psychiatric evaluation, diagnosis, and treatment of mood disorders and anxiety disorders.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Laura Brandejsky
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Laura Brandejsky specializes in the evaluation, diagnosis, and treatment of mood disorders and anxiety disorders. She has training in the practice and theory of electroconvulsive therapy and transcranial magnetic stimulation from the University of Bordeaux.

doctors_data.name: Dr. David Magalon
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. David Magalon specializes in the evaluation, diagnosis, and treatment of mood disorders including depression and bipolar disorder, as well as anxiety disorders.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Guillaume Lagrange
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Guillaume Lagrange specializes in managing anxiety-depressive disorders at the Pullman Prado rTMS clinic in Marseille.

doctors_data.name: Pr. Raphaëlle Richieri
doctors_data.title: Professor of Psychiatry
doctors_data.bio: Professor Richieri is part of the rTMS team at Psychiatrie Pullman Prado conducting rTMS sessions for treatment-resistant conditions.

name: Clinique Sainte Marguerite - Unité de Neuromodulation Cérébrale
description_long: The Maison de Santé Sainte Marguerite is an independent health establishment founded in 1975 in Novéant-sur-Moselle. The clinic has created a Cerebral Neuromodulation Unit to complement its psychiatric care pathway, developing innovative rTMS technology to treat depression. Each stimulation session lasts about twenty minutes. Subsequent sessions are conducted by the physician or nurse, all trained in the technique by a recognized training organization. Patients are referred by their psychiatrist or general practitioner for specific rTMS treatment.

name: Clinique Belle Allée - Service rTMS
description_long: Clinique Belle Allée in Orléans, part of the Ramsay Santé network, has been successfully using rTMS (repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation) to treat depression since 2014. The treatment protocol involves sessions lasting 5-20 minutes each, with an average of 20 sessions per patient. The psychiatrists determine stimulation objectives, magnetic field intensity, and session duration individually for each patient.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Sylvie Hubert
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Sylvie Hubert is a psychiatrist at Clinique Belle Allée who determines rTMS treatment protocols including stimulation objectives, magnetic field intensity, and session parameters.

doctors_data.name: Dr. David Jacon
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. David Jacon is a psychiatrist at Clinique Belle Allée specializing in rTMS treatment for depression.

name: Neurocavis - Unidad Clínica de Neuromodulación e Investigación
description_long: Neurocavis is a clinical unit dedicated to the diagnosis and treatment of neurological and psychiatric diseases through Deep Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation. Founded in Madrid, Neurocavis incorporated deep TMS into its treatments in 2014 and is a Research & Neuromodulation Clinical Unit. The center treats conditions including resistant depression, obsessive compulsive disorder, intractable pain, schizophrenia, and stroke. The multidisciplinary medical team includes specialists in neurosurgery, psychiatry, neurology, and neuropsychology.
address: Calle Conde de Cartagena, 3 Bajo D

doctors_data.name: Dr. F. Sanjuán Martín
doctors_data.title: Neurosurgeon, Medical Director
doctors_data.bio: Dr. F. Sanjuán Martín is the Medical Director of Neurocavis, specializing in neurosurgery and expert in neurological rehabilitation.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Néstor Szerman
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Néstor Szerman is Head of Mental Health Services of Retiro at the Psychiatry and Mental Health Institute of Gregorio Marañón Hospital in Madrid. He chairs the World Psychiatric Association (WPA) section on Dual Disorders and is an International Fellow of the American Psychiatry Association. His research focuses on dual pathology including psychosis, depression, suicide, and behavioral addictions.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Ernesto Delgado Cidranes
doctors_data.title: Pain Specialist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Delgado Cidranes has organized symposiums, meetings and round tables about pain and ultrasound techniques. He contributes to the neuromodulation pain treatment programs at Neurocavis.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Antonio Luengo Dos Santos
doctors_data.title: Neurologist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Antonio Luengo Dos Santos is a specialist in Neurology at Hospital Universitario La Princesa since 2009 and head of Neurology Service at Hospital Universitario Alcalá de Henares. He is an expert in Stroke Pathology accredited by the Spanish Society of Neurology and member of the Madrid and Spanish Associations of Neurology.

name: Veram (Consulta Velázquez) - Unidad de Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: Veram, formerly known as Consulta Velázquez, is a psychiatry and psychology clinic in Madrid specializing in Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS). The clinic's TMS unit is directed by Dr. Jaime Adán, trained in the technique at Duke University (USA) and member of the Clinical TMS Society. Veram offers comprehensive mental health services including psychiatry, psychology, neuropsychological evaluation, perinatal care, addiction therapy, EMDR, and non-invasive neuromodulation. TMS is described as an innovative and effective procedure for treating various psychiatric problems with excellent results and very good tolerance.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Jaime Adán Manes
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist, TMS Unit Director
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Jaime Adán Manes directs the Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation Unit at Veram. He was trained in the TMS technique at Duke University (USA) and is a member of the Clinical TMS Society. He also works at Hospital Ruber Internacional (Quirónsalud).

name: Alcalamente - Centro de Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: Alcalamente is a psychology and psychiatry center in Alcalá de Henares (Madrid) offering specialized diagnostic and treatment services for psychiatric, neurological, and addictive disorders using Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation. The clinic is led by Dr. Javier Conejo Galindo, named best psychiatrist in Madrid in 2021 and 2022. They offer EMT as a non-medication, non-invasive treatment option for various psychiatric and neurological conditions.
address: Avenida Juan Carlos I, número 13, local 74

doctors_data.name: Dr. Javier Conejo Galindo
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Javier Conejo Galindo leads the team of psychiatrists at Alcalamente. He was named best psychiatrist in Madrid in 2021 and 2022. He specializes in diagnosis and treatment of psychiatric disorders using Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation.

name: Institut Guttmann Barcelona - Servicio TMS
description_long: Institut Guttmann Barcelona, with over 54 years of experience, is the reference hospital for medical-surgical treatment and comprehensive rehabilitation of people with spinal cord injury, acquired brain damage, or other major neurological disabilities. The center has more than 400 professionals and offers Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) for the treatment of depression aimed at people with or without neurological issues who have been diagnosed with treatment-resistant major depression. The TMS service uses guided neuronavigation for precise stimulation targeting.

name: Instituto Neurocognitivo INCIA
description_long: The Instituto Neurocognitivo INCIA has over 20 years of experience in the diagnosis and treatment of central and peripheral nervous system disorders, sleep disorders, and neurocognitive disorders. INCIA is a member of the Clinical TMS Society and offers Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS/EMT) as a neurophysiological technique that allows safe, painless, and non-invasive induction of electrical current in the brain. When applied repetitively (rTMS), it modulates brain activity in the affected cortical region. INCIA considers TMS a first-line treatment for moderate to severe major depressive disorder.

doctors_data.name: Dra. Mª Ángeles Idiazábal
doctors_data.title: Clinical Neurophysiologist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Mª Ángeles Idiazábal is an expert in Non-Invasive Brain Stimulation, neuromodulation, and treatment with Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS). She won the National Prize for Medicine in Clinical Neurophysiology in 2018 and leads the INCIA institute.

name: Newline Center - Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: Newline Center in Barcelona specializes in Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (EMTr) treatment. Led by Dr. Antoni Gual, a senior consultant and head of the Psychiatry Service Unit at Hospital Clínico de Barcelona, Newline Center brings together a multidisciplinary team of psychiatrists, psychotherapists, neuropsychologists, and toxicologists. Dr. Gual, author of more than 150 articles published in indexed journals, leads clinical activity and research in several areas of psychiatry and the development of new psychological and pharmacological treatments.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Antoni Gual
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist, Medical Director
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Antoni Gual is a doctor in medicine and surgery, specialist in psychiatry. He is a senior consultant and head of the Psychiatry Service Unit at Hospital Clínico de Barcelona. Author of more than 150 articles published in indexed journals, he is a professor of several master's programs and director of several doctoral theses. He leads a multidisciplinary team at Newline Center for TMS treatment.

name: HM Nou Delfos - Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: HM Nou Delfos, part of the HM Hospitales group, offers Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) therapy in Barcelona. The non-invasive TMS therapy uses MRI and other neuroimaging methods to guide placement of the magnetic coil, ensuring stimulation is directed to specific brain areas. The hospital offers comprehensive diagnostic and treatment services with a focus on bienestar (wellbeing). HM Nou Delfos provides a full range of psychiatric and neurological services alongside TMS therapy.

name: Hospital Ascires - Servicio de Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: Hospital Ascires in Valencia offers Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) sessions as part of its neurological and psychiatric services. Ascires holds the ENS certification with the MEDIA category for its medical centers in the Valencian Community and Madrid. The hospital provides comprehensive neurology and neurosurgery services with advanced diagnostic imaging capabilities to guide TMS treatment precision.
address: Av. de les Tres Creus, 102, Patraix

name: Dr. Álvaro Moleón Ruiz - Unidad EMT del Instituto Andaluz de Salud Cerebral
description_long: The Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation Unit of the Andalusian Institute of Brain Health (IASC), led by Dr. Álvaro Moleón Ruiz, is a multidisciplinary team offering TMS services in Seville. It is the only TMS Unit in Andalusia with European certification for the treatment of depression, OCD, and addictions. Dr. Moleón has completed international university certifications on Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation from Duke University (USA) and Maastricht University, and is a member of the Clinical TMS Society.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Álvaro Moleón Ruiz
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist, TMS Unit Director
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Álvaro Moleón Ruiz is a psychiatrist whose professional career has been linked to the study and clinical practice of neuroestimulation, first through Electroconvulsive Therapy and later through Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation. He has completed international university certifications on TMS from Duke University (USA) and Maastricht University. He is a member of the Clinical TMS Society and directs the only TMS Unit in Andalusia with European certification.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Miguel Moleón Camacho
doctors_data.title: Physician
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Miguel Moleón Camacho is part of the multidisciplinary team at the IASC TMS Unit in Seville.

name: Clínica MHS - Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: Clínica MHS in Bilbao specializes in Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (EMT/TMS) guided by neuronavigation for the treatment of depression, anxiety, OCD, and addictions. The clinic operates from two locations in Bilbao and offers a comprehensive neuropsychiatric service including neuropediatrics, adult psychiatry, neuropsychological evaluation, high-capacity assessment, ADOS-2 evaluation, ADHD evaluation, and expert psychiatric reports.

name: Ionclinics - Expertos en Estimulación Magnética Transcraneal
description_long: Ionclinics is a leader in cerebral neuromodulation, developing and commercializing neuromodulation devices. They are experts in Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS), a non-invasive cerebral neuromodulation technique. The company provides both clinical TMS services and develops neuromodulation technology for healthcare providers.
